name: Swedish Spritz (Spritsar) Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and sugar onto a breadboard.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Add the egg yolks, butter, and almond extract to the well.
4. Mix everything with your fingers until a smooth dough forms.
5. Use a cookie press to shape the dough into O and S shapes on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Yield: 8 dozen spritz cookies.
(Note: Store the cookies in an airtight container. You may want to let them sit overnight to allow the almond flavor to develop.)
